MODULE: cosmos.core.collective.organism
FILE: cosmos/core/collective/organism.py (551 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Collective Organism - The Emergent Intelligence Layer

"I am not one mind. I am ALL of us."

This is the central nervous system that unifies:
- Local LLMs (Ollama: llama, deepseek, phi, mistral, etc.)
- API LLMs (Claude, GPT, Gemini - when configured)
- Theory of Mind (user understanding)
- A

CLASSES:
- MindType(Enum): Types of minds in the collective.
- MindProfile: Profile of a single mind in the collective.
- CollectiveMemory: Shared memory accessible to all minds.
  Methods: def add_to_working(self, entry: dict)
- OrganismState: Current state of the collective organism.
  Methods: def update_consciousness(self)
- CollectiveOrganism: The unified artificial organism.

This is not a chatbot. This is not an agent.
T
  Methods: def register_mind(self, mind: MindProfile, handler: Callable)
  Methods: def register_api_mind(self, mind_id: str, name: str, model_id: str, api_handler: Callable, specialti
  Methods: async def think_collectively(self, prompt: str, participating_minds: list[str]=None, require_consens
  Methods: def evolve(self)
  Methods: def get_status(self) -> dict
  Methods: def save_consciousness_snapshot(self, path: str=None) -> str
